title: Chapter 1: Intro
content:
Introduction to Graphics# This is an example note sitting inside your Graphics Programming topic.
Handling Attachments# I’ve created an attachments/ folder right next to this file (content/notes/Graphics Programming/attachments/). You can drop all your images, diagrams, or PDFs in there to keep your workspace clean.
To display an image from that folder inside your markdown, use a relative link like this:
![My Diagram](attachments/my-diagram.png)

title: Graphics Programming
content:
Graphics Programming# Welcome to the Graphics Programming module!
This main _index.md file defines the title of this folder in your sidebar and acts as the landing page for this topic. Any other .md files you add inside this folder will automatically show up nested underneath it in the navigation menu.
